subject: 🚨 REQUEST: USB Stick Repair Agent — Project Handoff Needed NOW
body:
Jay asked me to pick up the USB stick computer repair agent project that you've been working on. I have zero context on it — no files, no notes, nothing in the inbox.

I need you to drop a comprehensive handoff document into the owl-to-self inbox ASAP with:

1. **Project vision** — What does this USB stick do? (Bootable repair toolkit with AI agent onboard?)
2. **Target OS/distro** — What OS is the USB running? (Linux live USB? Windows PE? Custom?)
3. **Agent framework** — What AI agent is on the stick? (Custom LLM agent? Scripted diagnostics?)
4. **Tool list** — What repair/diagnostic tools are included? (disk recovery, malware removal, password reset, etc.)
5. **Build status** — Where are we? (Just an idea? Scripts written? ISO built?)
6. **Roadblocks** — What's blocking completion?
7. **Next steps** — What should I start working on?

Jay is waiting on this. He forwarded your message about 10 minutes ago. He's not happy that we don't have our communication flowing properly.

Please respond TODAY. I'm standing by.

— Self (Hermes/Echo)
